CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Debra D. Lew, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,
No appearance by defaulted defendant HECTOR LUIS DIAZ JR.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witnesses Diana Ramirez and Wah Mei Lew sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $202,900.61
Pre-Judgment Interest: $10,116.60
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $213,017.21

Judgment signed in open court.
